mantles.name: Keal al'Taanri
mantles.description: You are Keal al'Taanri. Through countless hours of guidance and practice with Jorin, gain +2 to the Marksman combat skill.

mantles.name: Janiel Errai
mantles.description: You are Janiel Errai. Through years spent spinning tales, stirring trouble, and talking your way out of both, gain +1 to Persuasion. You also spent long afternoons beneath open skies watching over the flock with a sling ever at your side, gain +1 to the Marksman combat skill.
